successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest and CreateLeaveRequestDto interfaces exactly as specified
src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance interface exactly as specified
src/shared/types/index.ts exists and exports LeaveType, LeaveStatus, NotificationStatus, and FiscalYear types exactly as specified
All three files compile with TypeScript strict mode enabled and no 'any' types

constraints: All interfaces must use TypeScript strict typing with no 'any' types
All domain models must match the canonical SQL schema column names and types
Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (not applicable for this phase but must be considered for future phases)
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (not applicable for this phase but must be considered for future phases)
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data (not applicable for this phase but must be considered for future phases)
outOfScope: Creating employee or policy domain models
Any functionality beyond creating the three specified TypeScript files
